name: Narendra Modi Stadium
tagline: The world's largest cricket stadium, tuned for massive matchday flow.

scheduleTemplate.title: Gates Open
scheduleTemplate.desc: Entry begins across all gates. Arrive early for easier screening.

scheduleTemplate.title: Toss Ceremony
scheduleTemplate.desc: Team announcements and toss on the field.

scheduleTemplate.title: First Innings
scheduleTemplate.desc: Opening innings begins. Seating areas stabilize quickly after start.

scheduleTemplate.title: Innings Break
scheduleTemplate.desc: Short rush window for food, restrooms, and concourse movement.

scheduleTemplate.title: Second Innings
scheduleTemplate.desc: Fans return to seats as play resumes.

scheduleTemplate.title: Staggered Exit
scheduleTemplate.desc: Zone-wise exit guidance begins to ease parking and gate pressure.

suggestedQuestions.label: 🚻 Nearest restroom
suggestedQuestions.question: Where is the nearest restroom with the shortest wait right now?

suggestedQuestions.label: 🍔 Shortest food queue
suggestedQuestions.question: Which food stall has the shortest queue right now?

suggestedQuestions.label: 📅 Upcoming events
suggestedQuestions.question: What is coming up next in the event schedule?

suggestedQuestions.label: ♿ Accessible seating
suggestedQuestions.question: Where can I find wheelchair accessible seating and staff support?

suggestedQuestions.label: 🚪 Emergency exits
suggestedQuestions.question: What are the nearest emergency exits and medical points?

assistPrompts.label: ♿ Accessible Route
assistPrompts.question: What is the easiest wheelchair-friendly route from Gate A to the pavilion areas?

assistPrompts.label: 💺 Seating Help
assistPrompts.question: Where can I find companion seating and accessible seating help right now?

assistPrompts.label: 🦻 Hearing Support
assistPrompts.question: Where can I get hearing assistance or a hearing loop inside the stadium?

assistPrompts.label: 👁️ Visual Support
assistPrompts.question: What visual assistance services are available and where do I request them?

accessibility.title: Wheelchair Routes
accessibility.desc: Accessible ramps are available at Gate A and Gate B, with elevator access near both pavilion levels.

accessibility.title: Hearing Assistance
accessibility.desc: Hearing loop support is available in the Club House and at the main information desk near Gate A.

accessibility.title: Visual Assistance
accessibility.desc: Audio help and braille venue guides are available at information kiosks across the concourse.

accessibility.title: Accessible Seating
accessibility.desc: Dedicated wheelchair and companion seating is distributed across the main stands with steward support on request.

services.firstAidPrompt: Where is the nearest first aid station inside Narendra Modi Stadium?
services.lostFoundPrompt: How do I report a lost item at Narendra Modi Stadium and where is lost and found?
services.transportPrompt: What are the best transport options for leaving Narendra Modi Stadium after the event?
services.firstAidInfo: Medical hubs are placed near Gate A and Gate B with roaming response teams across the bowl.
services.lostFoundInfo: Lost and found support is coordinated through the information desk near Gate A and the main operations desk.
services.transportInfo: Primary pickup pressure builds around Gate A after the event. Use staggered exit guidance and follow parking/metro signage.

emergency.exitMessage: Follow zone-wise exit announcements and avoid rushing the main gate.
